BackstoryDef.title: SEAL Commander
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was born on Earth, the third planet of the Sol system. {PAWN_pronoun} was raised by {PAWN_possessive} father's former comrade-in-arms, a man who lived in eternal regret for accidentally killing {PAWN_nameDef}'s father during a mission. Driven by this legacy, {PAWN_nameDef} followed in {PAWN_possessive} father's footsteps and joined the Navy, eventually commanding elite special forces.

BackstoryDef.title: Gestalt No.0
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: As one of the first elites to leave Earth, {PAWN_nameDef} drifted in space for an unknown era before being captured. {PAWN_possessive} captors forcibly implanted {PAWN_pronoun} with Protoss organs and a mind-control device in {PAWN_possessive} brain, forcing {PAWN_pronoun} to commit acts against {PAWN_possessive} will. Only after a Protoss prisoner sacrificed himself to break the mental link did {PAWN_nameDef} regain {PAWN_possessive} freedom. Now, {PAWN_pronoun} serves the Protoss as a member of the Purifiers, fighting in hopes of one day returning to Earth.
